back_translation: Christ has liberated us to be free, for that freedom; therefore stand firmly, and do not let yourselves fall under the yoke of slavery again
Take notice, I, Paul, declare to you that if you all consent to circumcision, Christ will not be of any benefit to you at all
I testify again to every person who consents to circumcision that he is one obligated to keep the entire Law
You all who are currently trying to be declared righteous by the Law have been cut off from Christ, and have fallen away from grace
For we, by the Spirit and through faith, are eagerly awaiting the hope of righteousness
For in Jesus Christ, circumcision or non-circumcision has no value at all; only faith expressing itself through love
You all used to run well; then who has come to obstruct you so as not to obey the truth?
Persuasion of that sort does not come from the One who called you
A little leaven causes the whole lump of dough to rise
I have confidence in the Lord that you all will not think otherwise. But the one who is causing you trouble will have to bear the judgment, no matter who he may be
Brothers and sisters, if I were still preaching circumcision, why am I still being persecuted now? If so, the stumbling-cause of the cross would have been abolished by now
I would wish that those who cause turmoil among you would just cut off their organs entirely; that would be better
Brothers and sisters, you all were called to have freedom; just please do not let that freedom be an opportunity for the flesh, but serve one another with love
For the entire law has been brought to fulfillment in a single command, that is, 'Love your neighbor as yourself'
But if you all keep on biting and devouring one another, do take care, fearing that you all will be destroyed by one another
I therefore say, do live your life according to the Spirit, and you will not do the cravings of the flesh at all
For the flesh has desire conflicting with the Spirit, and the Spirit conflicts with the flesh; these two oppose one another, so that you all would not do what you yourselves want
But if you are being led by the Spirit, you are not under the Law
The works of the flesh are clearly visible, that is: sexual transgression, impurity, lustful-passion
idolatry, magical-arts, enmity, quarreling, jealousy, rage, selfish-ambition, division, factional-groups
envy, drunkenness, wild-revelry, and things similar to these. I warn you in advance, just as I warned previously, that those who practice such things will not inherit the kingdom of God
But the fruit of the Spirit is: love, joy, peace, patience-with-restraint, kindness, goodness, faithfulness
polite-gentleness, and self-control. The Law naturally has no prohibition against such things
And those who belong to Christ have crucified the flesh together with [its] passions and cravings at the cross already
Since we live by the Spirit, let us also walk according to the Spirit
Let us not become persons proud over empty things, provoking one another, envying one another
